speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: Hie, good Sir Michael, bear this sealèd brief

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: With wingèd haste to the Lord Marshal,

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: This to my cousin Scroop, and all the rest

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: To whom they are directed. If you knew

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: How much they do import, you would make haste.

speaker:
SIR
               
              MICHAEL
text: My good lord, I guess their tenor.

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: Like enough you do.

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: Tomorrow, good Sir Michael, is a day

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: Wherein the fortune of ten thousand men

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: Must bide the touch. For, sir, at Shrewsbury,

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: As I am truly given to understand,

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: The King with mighty and quick-raisèd power

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: Meets with Lord Harry. And I fear, Sir Michael,

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: What with the sickness of Northumberland,

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: Whose power was in the first proportion,

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: And what with Owen Glendower’s absence thence,

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: Who with them was a rated sinew too

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: And comes not in, o’erruled by prophecies,

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: I fear the power of Percy is too weak

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: To wage an instant trial with the King.

speaker:
SIR
               
              MICHAEL
text: Why, my good lord, you need not fear.

speaker:
SIR
               
              MICHAEL
text: There is Douglas and Lord Mortimer.

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: No, Mortimer is not there.

speaker:
SIR
               
              MICHAEL
text: But there is Mordake, Vernon, Lord Harry Percy,

speaker:
SIR
               
              MICHAEL
text: And there is my Lord of Worcester, and a head

speaker:
SIR
               
              MICHAEL
text: Of gallant warriors, noble gentlemen.

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: And so there is. But yet the King hath drawn

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: The special head of all the land together:

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: The Prince of Wales, Lord John of Lancaster,

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: The noble Westmoreland, and warlike Blunt,

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: And many more corrivals and dear men

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: Of estimation and command in arms.

speaker:
SIR
               
              MICHAEL
text: Doubt not, my lord, they shall be well opposed.

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: I hope no less, yet needful ’tis to fear;

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: And to prevent the worst, Sir Michael, speed.

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: For if Lord Percy thrive not, ere the King

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: Dismiss his power he means to visit us,

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: For he hath heard of our confederacy,

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: And ’tis but wisdom to make strong against him.

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: Therefore make haste. I must go write again

speaker: ARCHBISHOP
text: To other friends. And so farewell, Sir Michael.
